description: Move slot definitions for the VPG Engine. Each slot is a unique input/state combination that a move can be assigned to.

field_definitions.slot_id: Unique identifier for this slot. Used to assign moves to slots.
field_definitions.position: Broad area of the game system.
field_definitions.category: Functional grouping within a position (UI-ready title case).
field_definitions.category_id: snake_case version of category, for code references.
field_definitions.group: Eligibility group; moves reference groups, not individual slots.
field_definitions.player_state: Array of player states this slot is valid in (any of these).
field_definitions.opponent_state: Array of opponent states this slot is valid against (any of these). 'n/a' means no opponent required.
field_definitions.range: Distance modifier: close, mid, any, or n/a.
field_definitions.requires_special: True if special meter is required to trigger this slot.
field_definitions.trigger: 'manual' (player input fires the slot) or 'automatic' (engine fires it from context).
field_definitions.input_pattern: Structured input matcher for the engine. Null for automatic slots.
field_definitions.input_pattern.buttons: Buttons that must all be pressed simultaneously. Mutually exclusive with mash_buttons.
field_definitions.input_pattern.mash_buttons: Pool of buttons for rapid-tap (mashing) slots. Any press of any pool button counts toward the mash; engine fires the slot when press count exceeds threshold within a time window.
field_definitions.input_pattern.button_alternatives: Groups of 'either/or' button options, e.g. [['a','b']] for '[A] or [B]'. Player presses any one button from each group.
field_definitions.input_pattern.dpad: Acceptable d-pad directions: array of 'up'/'down'/'left'/'right', or ['any'], or null if d-pad isn't part of the input.
field_definitions.input_pattern.control_stick: Acceptable control stick flick directions, same shape as dpad.
field_definitions.input_pattern.modifier: 'tap' | 'hold' | 'rapid_tap' | null. Distinguishes weak/strong grapples and mash inputs.
field_definitions.input_pattern.requires_run: True if [Run] must be held when the input is given.
field_definitions.input_pattern.release_run: True if the slot fires on RELEASE of [Run] (not press). Used by turnbuckle flying attacks: requires_run=true + release_run=true together mean 'player ran into corner to climb the turnbuckle, slot fires when [Run] is released to launch the move'.
field_definitions.setup: Human-readable description of how to perform the move, for help/training UI.
